water_usage.detail: Reports total water consumption annually (8.1B gallons in 2024, up 88% since 2019). Reports fleet-wide WUE (~1.1 L/kWh).

energy_usage.detail: Reports total energy consumption and fleet-wide PUE (~1.10). Publishes carbon-free energy percentage.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Some facility-level data available (e.g., Council Bluffs 1B gallons in 2024), but not systematically published for all sites.

ai_specific_data.detail: Published per-query water estimate for Gemini (0.26 ml) via Google Cloud Blog (2025).

water_pledge.detail: Pledged to replenish 120% of water consumed by 2030. Replenished ~4.5B gallons (~64%) in 2024.

water_usage.detail: Reports total water consumption annually (6.4M cubic meters in 2022, 34% YoY increase). Explicitly attributed increase to AI infrastructure.

energy_usage.detail: Reports total energy consumption. Does not consistently report average PUE across fleet.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Does not publish per-facility water or energy breakdowns.

ai_specific_data.detail: No published water or energy data specific to AI workloads or OpenAI models.

water_pledge.detail: Pledged to be water positive by 2030 — replenish more water than consumed globally.

water_usage.detail: Reports water use but with less granularity than peers. Official total figures are less clear than Google or Microsoft.

energy_usage.detail: Reports renewable energy progress (100% renewable by 2025 goal). Only market-based emissions reported, not location-based. Does not report PUE.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Does not publish per-facility water or energy data.

ai_specific_data.detail: No published water or energy data specific to AI/ML workloads.

water_pledge.detail: Pledged to be water positive by 2030. Some AWS regions use zero-water cooling (e.g., Ireland, Sweden).

water_usage.detail: Reports total water consumption (813M gallons in 2023, 95% from data centers). Reports WUE (~0.26 L/kWh), among the lowest in industry.

energy_usage.detail: Reports total energy consumption and renewable energy progress.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Some facility-level detail published (e.g., Prineville, OR uses zero water for cooling).

ai_specific_data.detail: No published water or energy data specific to AI workloads (LLaMA training, Reels inference, etc.).

water_pledge.detail: Committed to net-zero emissions across value chain by 2030; water stewardship investments ongoing.

water_usage.detail: No sustainability report or water usage data published as of March 2026.

energy_usage.detail: No energy consumption data published. Relies on AWS and Google Cloud infrastructure.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Not applicable — Anthropic does not operate its own data centers.

ai_specific_data.detail: No per-model or per-query energy or water data published.

water_usage.detail: No sustainability report or water usage data published as of March 2026.

energy_usage.detail: No energy consumption data published. Relies on third-party cloud infrastructure.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Not applicable — Perplexity does not operate its own data centers.

ai_specific_data.detail: No per-query energy or water data published.

water_usage.detail: CEO disclosed ~0.3 ml direct water per average ChatGPT query (mid-2025), but no total water consumption figures or methodology published. Excludes indirect water from electricity generation.

energy_usage.detail: CEO disclosed ~0.34 Wh per average ChatGPT query (mid-2025). No total energy consumption figures published. Runs on Microsoft Azure infrastructure.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Does not operate its own data centers (runs on Microsoft Azure). No facility-level data published. Stargate project campuses are under construction.

ai_specific_data.detail: Published per-query energy and water estimates for ChatGPT via CEO statement, but figures are unverified, exclude training costs, and definition of 'average query' is unclear.

water_pledge.detail: Stargate project commits to closed-loop cooling and water positivity at new campuses via partner Vantage, but no company-wide water positive pledge published by OpenAI itself.

water_usage.detail: No water usage data published. Memphis Colossus facility draws ~1.3M gallons/day from the aquifer per reporting by environmental groups, but xAI has not disclosed figures itself.

energy_usage.detail: No energy consumption data published. Operates its own data centers with gas turbines and battery storage, but has not disclosed total energy usage.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Operates the Colossus facility in Memphis, TN, but publishes no environmental data for it. Environmental impact information comes from third-party investigations and permit filings.

ai_specific_data.detail: No per-model or per-query energy or water data published for Grok models.

water_pledge.detail: Building an $80M water recycling plant to use treated wastewater instead of aquifer water at Memphis facility, expected operational late 2026. No formal company-wide water positive pledge.

water_usage.detail: Published total water consumption for Mistral Large 2: 281,000 m3 over 18 months (training + inference). Conducted ISO 14040/44-compliant lifecycle analysis with Carbone 4 and ADEME.

energy_usage.detail: Published energy data and greenhouse gas emissions (20.4 kt CO2e for Mistral Large 2 training + 18 months of use) via comprehensive lifecycle analysis.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Operates a 40 MW facility in Essonne, France and is building data centers in Sweden, but does not publish per-facility environmental breakdowns.

ai_specific_data.detail: Published per-query environmental impact: 45 ml water, 1.14g CO2e, and 0.16 mg antimony-equivalent resource depletion per 400-token Le Chat response.

water_pledge.detail: No water positive or replenishment pledge. Committed to ongoing environmental reporting and contributing to international AI sustainability standards.

water_usage.detail: No sustainability report or water usage data published as of March 2026.

energy_usage.detail: No energy consumption data published. Published a policy primer on AI energy efficiency but disclosed no data about its own operations. Relies on third-party cloud infrastructure.

per_facility_reporting.detail: Not applicable — Cohere does not operate its own data centers.

ai_specific_data.detail: No per-model or per-query energy or water data published.
